Using time-resolved near-infrared spectroscopy, absolute concentrations of deoxy- and total[Hb + Mb] were assessed simultaneously in VLs and VLd. items.description: CONCLUSION: PIM and medication overuse, as well as drug and vaccine underuse, are very common among older German individuals.
